title: Ukrainian Citrusy Chicken Broil
description: A low-carb friendly, broiled chicken dish from Ukraine that's full of citrus flavors and easy to meal prep. Great for weeknights!
instructions: Preheat the broiler. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Season the chicken breasts with salt and black pepper.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and Sriracha (if using).
Add the chicken breasts to the marinade and toss to coat.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place on the prepared baking sheet.
Broil the chicken for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
Garnish with chopped parsley and a squeeze of lime juice (if using).
Serve with additional Sriracha and chopped fresh dill (if using).
Store leftover chicken in a sealed container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
Reheat the chicken in the oven before serving.
